tasks.subject: Task 0: Skapa nya tabeller och storage bucket
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lägg till customers, customer_dogs, bookings, recurring_schedule, messages, plus photo_url/customer_notes på dogs. Skapa dog-photos bucket.

```json:metadata
{"files":["supabase/migrations/20260513_001_customer_portal_tables.sql"],"verifyCommand":"mcp__supabase__list_tables","acceptanceCriteria":["Alla nya tabeller finns","dogs har photo_url och customer_notes","dog-photos bucket finns"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: RLS-policies för nya tabeller + admin-bypass
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Säkra nya tabeller med customer- och admin-policies + is_admin_user() + current_customer_id() helpers.

```json:metadata
{"files":["supabase/migrations/20260513_002_customer_portal_rls.sql"],"verifyCommand":"pg_policies query","acceptanceCriteria":["RLS aktivt på alla nya tabeller","Minst 2 policies per tabell"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Strama åt RLS på dogs/boarding_records/planning_history/box_settings
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ersätt Allow all operations med scopeade admin- och customer-policies. Fixa function search_path.

```json:metadata
{"files":["supabase/migrations/20260513_003_tighten_legacy_rls.sql"],"verifyCommand":"mcp__supabase__get_advisors type=security","acceptanceCriteria":["Inga policies med qual=true kvar på dessa tabeller","Admin kan fortfarande använda app"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Regenerera TypeScript-typer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** database.types.ts matchar verkligt schema med nya tabeller och kolumner.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/database.types.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["Typer för nya tabeller finns","dogs.Row har photo_url och customer_notes","npm run build passerar"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Customer auth helpers + ProtectedCustomerRoute
tasks.description:
**Goal:** customerAuth.ts (getCustomerForUser, isAdminUser, signIn/Out) och ProtectedCustomerRoute som redirectar admin->/admin, anon->/login.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/customerAuth.ts","src/components/customer/ProtectedCustomerRoute.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["Exports korrekta","Route redirectar rätt"]}
```
